implementation.commitSubject: feat(world): 将兼容运行时接入世界时钟
implementation.compatibilityBoundary: useWorldRuntime remains available while low-frequency time, visibility, scene and sound facts enter the sliced store

failedObservationAndCorrection.observation: CDP Page.setWebLifecycleState frozen/active did not dispatch the standard document visibilitychange event in this Chromium run.
failedObservationAndCorrection.correction: The browser verification overrode document.hidden and dispatched visibilitychange, matching the controller's public browser contract; unit tests independently cover listener and timer cleanup.
failedObservationAndCorrection.claimBoundary: No claim is made that CDP lifecycle commands are equivalent to browser visibility events.

remainingBoundary: C.4 proves a low-frequency clock and compatibility adapter, not a continuously living scene.
Gateway semantic layers, ambient adapters and quiet/background-hidden behavior begin at C.5.
The ten-minute vertical slice and resource stability remain open until C.10-C.13.
